seeds.description: Fig & Bloom stacked logo in black on transparent background. Square composition, 1000x1000px.
Fig & Bloom horizontal wordmark in black on transparent background. 914x200px. Elegant serif 'Fig&Bloom' lockup.

Broome Regular bouquet hero. Full wrapped bouquet on grey/white ground. White tissue wrap, black satin ribbon, Fig & Bloom circular black sticker. All-season. Compact composition. Colour story: warm rust + blush + amber. Flowers: banksia, pink lisianthus, alstroemeria, strawflower (bracteantha), eucalyptus.
Broome Regular detail crop 1. Close-up of pink lisianthus, alstroemeria, banksia and strawflower blooms. Warm rust + blush tones.
Broome Regular detail crop 2. Close-up showing banksia, pink lisianthus buds and pink chrysanthemum button.

Broome XLarge bouquet hero. Full wrapped bouquet on grey/white ground. White tissue wrap, black satin ribbon, F&B sticker. All-season. More voluminous composition, prominent alstroemeria. Colour story: warm rust + blush + amber. Flowers: banksia, lisianthus, alstroemeria, strawflower (bracteantha), eucalyptus.
Broome XLarge detail crop 1. Close-up of banksia cones, protea buds and lisianthus in larger arrangement.
Broome XLarge detail crop 2. Tight close-up of vivid strawflower heads (orange/red bracteantha), banksia and pink lisianthus.
Broome XLarge detail crop 3. Very close banksia focus — multiple banksia cones with red/orange strawflowers in foreground.

Osaka bouquet hero. Full wrapped bouquet on white ground. White tissue wrap, black satin ribbon, Fig & Bloom circular black sticker visible. All-season. Colour story: blush pink + white. Flowers: pink roses, white pompom disbuds (chrysanthemum), white snapdragons, white and pink gypsophila, eucalyptus. NOTE: seeds.json corrected per brand owner feedback 2026-04-18.
Osaka bouquet detail crop 1. Close-up of blooms and wrapping. Pompom chrysanthemums, blush spray roses. White tissue, black ribbon visible.
Osaka bouquet detail crop 2. Close-up showing bloom arrangement and tissue wrapping.
Osaka bouquet detail crop 3. Bloom and ribbon detail.
Osaka bouquet detail crop 4. Top-down or angled close-up of blooms.

Lucerne Large bouquet hero 1. Full wrapped bouquet on white surface. White tissue wrap, black ribbon. All-season. Colour story: pure white + ivory. Flowers: white alstroemeria, white stock, white roses, lisianthus.
Lucerne Large detail crop 1. Close-up of white blooms and tissue wrap.
Lucerne Large detail crop 2. Close-up of bloom arrangement.
Lucerne Large bouquet hero 2. Full wrapped bouquet. Second hero angle, white tissue, black ribbon.
Lucerne Large detail crop 3. Close-up of white blooms.
Lucerne Large detail crop 4. Close-up of ribbon, tissue and blooms.

Portofino bouquet hero. Full wrapped bouquet held at arms length or on surface. Summer. Colour story: vivid orange + fuchsia + purple. Flowers: orange roses, protea, purple stock, fuchsia spray roses.
Portofino bouquet detail crop 1. Close-up showing vivid bloom arrangement.
Portofino bouquet detail crop 2. Bloom and wrapping detail.
Portofino bouquet detail crop 3. Close-up of individual blooms.

Savoie bouquet hero. Full wrapped bouquet standing on white/grey ground. White tissue wrap, black satin ribbon. Clean studio shot. All-season. Colour story: white + sage-green + steel blue. Flowers: white stock, sea holly (eryngium), white ruffled stock.
Savoie bouquet detail crop 1. Close-up showing eryngium (sea holly) and white stock blooms.
Savoie bouquet detail crop 2. Close-up of ribbon and bloom arrangement.
Model wearing petl Beatle W4910 jet black wash jeans. Front three-quarter stance. Clean white/light backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing petl Beatle W4910 jet black wash jeans. Straight-on front view. Clean backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing petl Beatle W4910 jet black wash jeans. Rear view. Clean backdrop. No bouquet. Style-reference only.
Model wearing black open-weave mesh knit top (semi-sheer, boxy, half sleeves) with sand/cream wide-leg trousers. Straight-on front, full length. Clean light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing black open-weave mesh knit top with sand wide-leg trousers. Cropped three-quarter front (head to hip). Gaze direct. Clean light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing black open-weave mesh knit top with sand wide-leg trousers. Side profile, full length, gaze right. Clean light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing black open-weave mesh knit top with sand wide-leg trousers. Rear view, full length. Clean light grey backdrop. No bouquet. Style-reference only.
Model wearing white fitted short-sleeve t-shirt with small chest logo + black tiered chiffon maxi skirt, black heeled boots. Straight-on front, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing black tiered chiffon maxi skirt. Detail crop — lower half only, showing skirt tiers and gathered ruffle detail. Light grey backdrop. Style-reference only.
Model wearing white fitted t-shirt + black tiered chiffon maxi skirt. Side profile, full length, gaze right. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing white fitted t-shirt + black tiered chiffon maxi skirt. Rear view, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet. Style-reference only.

Model wearing dusty pink open-weave crochet polo knit top (short sleeve, polo collar, button placket, banded hem) with white tailored mini shorts and wine/burgundy pointed heels. Straight-on front, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.

Model wearing dusty pink open-weave crochet polo knit top with white tailored mini shorts. Cropped three-quarter front (head to mid-thigh), closer framing showing top detail. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing dusty pink open-weave crochet polo knit top with white tailored mini shorts. Three-quarter side profile, full length, gaze right. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model wearing dusty pink open-weave crochet polo knit top with white tailored mini shorts. Rear view, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet. Style-reference only.

Model A. Dark chocolate corset-style crop top (deep V-neck, boned bodice, sleeveless) with sand/camel wide-leg trousers and cream heels. Straight-on front, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model A. Dark chocolate corset crop top detail — cropped head to waist, showing deep V-neckline and boning seam construction. Sand trousers visible at hem. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model A. Dark chocolate corset crop top with sand wide-leg trousers. Three-quarter side profile, full length, gaze right. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Model A. Dark chocolate corset crop top with sand wide-leg trousers. Rear view, full length. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet. Style-reference only.

Model B (different model — lighter skin, straight brown hair, blue eyes). Dark chocolate corset crop top with matching dark chocolate midi skirt (tonal monochrome set). Cropped three-quarter front (head to hip), hands clasped. Light grey backdrop. No bouquet.
Fig & Bloom branded delivery card held in hand. White card with botanical line-art (woman with flowers) and order details printed. White tissue wrap visible in background.

Marseille bouquet. Large fuchsia/magenta bouquet held in hand (bracelet visible) against an outdoor patio with bougainvillea greenery. Fig & Bloom white tissue wrap and black ribbon. Vivid pink/purple colour palette — roses, snapdragons, purple stock, gypsophila, pink alstroemeria.

Marseille bouquet. Large fuchsia/magenta wrapped bouquet placed on a timber bedside console near a window. Styled with IKOU candle, rose lotion, and skin care products. Warm natural light. Bouquet still in tissue wrap with Fig & Bloom sticker visible.

Marseille bouquet. Large fuchsia/magenta bouquet unwrapped and arranged in a clear glass vase on a side table. Styled with IKOU candle, books, skincare. Window backdrop. Full bloom arrangement — roses, purple stock, snapdragons.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in hot pink/fuchsia fitted midi dress holding large red rose bouquet (with white alstroemeria, Fig & Bloom black ribbon). Bedroom interior, standing by white curtains. Looking down at bouquet, smiling. Gold earrings, layered necklace.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in hot pink/fuchsia fitted midi dress holding large red rose bouquet. Bedroom interior, looking at camera with warm smile. Same setting as bedroom-001 but different pose.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in pink/white floral print mini dress holding large fuchsia/magenta wrapped bouquet. Mediterranean-style outdoor venue — white render wall, bougainvillea overhead. Looking down at bouquet.
Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in pink/white floral print mini dress holding large fuchsia/magenta wrapped bouquet. Same outdoor venue, smiling directly at camera.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in cream/ivory satin halter top + white wide-leg trousers holding large fuchsia/magenta wrapped bouquet. Outside venue entrance, white render wall with greenery. Smiling at camera.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in cream/ivory halter outfit sitting on outdoor steps holding a brown cavoodle dog. Fuchsia/magenta bouquet visible in left foreground. Mediterranean outdoor setting with stone urn planter. Candid, joyful.

Marseille bouquet. UGC-style. Blonde woman in cream/ivory halter top + white wide-leg trousers sitting on white wicker/rattan chair inside a bright interior. Holding large fuchsia/magenta bouquet with Fig & Bloom tissue wrap visible. Olive tree in white pot behind her.
Banksia botanical wrapping paper pattern. Warm ochre and rust tones on kraft-style background. Full sheet view.
Banksia botanical wrapping paper pattern. Second view/angle. Same botanical print.
Banksia botanical wrapping paper pattern. Third view. Detail or folded portion.

Marseille Regular bouquet hero — white tissue paper wrap, charcoal ribbon, Fig & Bloom sticker, grey studio ground. Vibrant fuchsia-forward arrangement: blush roses, hot-pink roses, fuchsia dianthus clusters, peach snapdragons, pink gypsophila, burgundy stocks.

Marseille Regular bouquet hero — wide angle, white tissue wrap, charcoal ribbon, grey studio ground. Full flower spread visible: blush roses, hot-pink roses, fuchsia dianthus, burgundy stocks, peach snapdragons, pink gypsophila.
Marseille XL bouquet detail — close-up of blush and hot-pink roses with fuchsia dianthus clusters. Shows the dense, layered rose arrangement characteristic of the XL size.
Marseille XL bouquet detail — close-up showing magenta lisianthus, burgundy snapdragons, pink gypsophila, and blush rose. Shows texture and colour depth of the XL arrangement.
Marseille XL bouquet detail — close-up of pink gypsophila cloud, deep magenta lisianthus, burgundy snapdragons, and blush rose bud. Best reference for the airy gypsophila texture in this bouquet.

Fig & Bloom greeting card — Flowers design. White card with gold line-art illustration of two poppies/anemones, paired with black branded backing card ('Fig & Bloom') and kraft envelope. Warm white surface. Full product set shot.
Fig & Bloom greeting card — Flowers design close-up. White card fills frame; gold line-art poppies/anemones clearly visible. Black branded backing card and kraft envelope visible at edges.

Fig & Bloom greeting card — With Love design. White card with gold line-art of two intertwined hearts and flourishes; 'With love' in gold script at bottom. Kraft envelope behind, black branded card at left edge.

Fig & Bloom greeting card — With Love design (alternate shot, same composition as withlove-cu-001). White card with gold intertwined hearts line-art, 'With love' script. Kraft envelope and black branded card framing.

Fig & Bloom greeting card — Tulip design close-up. White card nearly fills frame; gold line-art single tulip stem with leaves. Black 'Fig & Bloom' branded backing card and kraft envelope visible at edges.
Fig & Bloom greeting card — Tulip design full set. White card with gold line-art single tulip, black 'Fig & Bloom' backing card, and kraft envelope; slight flat-lay angle on warm white surface.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — upright hero on marble surface. Bag upright centre-frame, chocolates spilled in front with one halved (raspberry jelly centre). Props: fresh raspberries, red jelly candy pieces, linen napkin. Warm golden-beige background. Best upright product hero.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — flat lay on marble surface. Bag horizontal centre, chocolates and halved pieces scattered around. Props: fresh raspberries, red jelly pieces, gold spoon, linen napkin corner. Overhead composition.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — spill shot on marble with pink woven placemat. Bag on its side (upside-down) with chocolates cascading out. Props: fresh raspberries, red jelly pieces, cocoa powder dust. Action/lifestyle energy.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — close-up spill on pink woven placemat. Bag open-end down, chocolates piled with one halved. Props: fresh raspberry, red jelly pieces. Tight, textural composition.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — angled shot on marble serving board. Bag open-end down, chocolates spread. Props: gold spoon with cocoa powder, fresh raspberry, red jelly pieces, linen napkin. Styling-forward, elevated food photography feel.

Fig & Bloom Milk Chocolate Raspberries (125g) — upright hero on pink woven placemat. Bag upright, chocolates spilled in front with one halved (raspberry centre visible). Fresh raspberry prop. Clean, simple upright composition on warm ground.
